game_name: Bubsy in: Claws Encounters of the Furred Kind

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Extra life at 500 collected; reward for exploration
Optional progression; player-discovered based on playtesting feedback
Obstacle avoidance; replaces catnip from original design

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced with alternating tension and relief; designed to be 'as fast as Sonic and as deep as Mario'; easy to play but hard to master progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret paths and underground tubes signal optional exploration; yarn balls scattered throughout encourage thoroughness
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Underground tube ways accessible from first level; hidden TVs (Windows version) reward exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational platforming and enemy-jumping mechanics introduced safely in Level 1; basic Woolie encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of varied hazards (banana peels) and more complex enemy patterns; speed requirements increase
notable_spikes: Transition from basic platforming to hazard-heavy segments
Levels requiring sustained speed and precision (Sonic-inspired pacing)

notable_level_patterns.description: Underground tubes and hidden areas integrated into level design; encourages replaying and exploration beyond critical path
Fast-paced side-scrolling segments inspired by Sonic the Hedgehog; player must maintain momentum while avoiding hazards
Woolies encountered individually early, then in groups; jumping-on mechanic is primary combat interaction
